## Test Environment
- Backend: Flask server on port 8000 (python server.py)
- Frontend: Vite dev server on port 5173 + built static served by Flask on port 8000
- Auth: Mocked via Playwright addInitScript (Object.defineProperty on window.SignalAuth)
- Market data: Mocked via SignalAuth.fetch interception (AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, TSLA, NVDA, META, AMZN + fallback)
- News data: Real from local SQLite DB; target_asset injected client-side to simulate AI-analyzed items
- Note: Server-side _shape_item() strips target_asset for unauthenticated requests (tier_gate middleware) — client-side ticker injection used to test rendering/price-fetch logic
